title: Episode 1
overview: Roland Wimbledon is the 4th Prince of Graycastle and halts the execution of Anna, a recently discovered witch.

title: Episode 2
overview: Roland asks Anna to help him create a new world that isn't bound by the Church, where witches can live freely.

title: Episode 3
overview: Roland recruits Karl to build a wall that can withstand the demonic beasts, and meets Nana, another witch.

title: Episode 4
overview: Roland discusses future plans for Border Town with the Longsong Stronghold Ambassador.

title: Episode 5
overview: Nightingale wants to take Anna and Nana back to the Witch Cooperation Association, but Anna refuses to leave.

title: Episode 6
overview: Despite having misgivings about Roland's methods of training, Carter oversees the training of the militia.
